summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening's carryover from Chapter 11's grocery-stocking moment and seeded the badge-dock detail at the end so Chapter 13's breakfast scene lands more continuously after the blackout.
edits: Linked the opening ravioli beat more explicitly to the groceries that were just put away in Chapter 11.
Added the badge dock returning red with the power so Chapter 13's charger problem is pre-seeded.
